ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library's purpose */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the library was released */,
  "supported_os" TEXT /* List of supported operating systems */,
  "dependency" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the library has any dependencies */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the library (e.g., development, testing, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function's purpose */,
  "parameter_types" TEXT /* List of parameter types for the function */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the function */,
  "code_example" TEXT /* Example code snippet for the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility record */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being checked */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library being checked */,
  "is_compatible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the function is compatible with the library */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compatibility (e.g., limitations, workarounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to (e.g., development, testing) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., function, library, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being used */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library being used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the function has been used with this library */,
  "last_usage" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "end_of_life" TEXT /* Date when the version reached end-of-life */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deprecations" (
  "deprecation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deprecation record */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deprecated function */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library where the function is deprecated */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date of deprecation */,
  "replacement_function" TEXT /* Name of the recommended replacement function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deprecation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deprecations_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deprecations_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being tested */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test case should be run (e.g., Windows, Linux, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case executed */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test case */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test case in seconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the test case failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., library update, deprecation, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
